name: Quick Chicken Noodle Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 6-quart saucepan, combine all ingredients except chicken and noodles; heat to boiling.
2. Add chicken and noodles; cook uncovered, stirring occasionally, for 8 minutes or until noodles and vegetables are tender.
3. Discard bay leaf. Serves 10 to 12.
